ddls:
CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "project_start_date" TEXT /* Date the project started */,
  "project_end_date" TEXT /* Expected or actual end date of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of the sensor (e.g., Laser, Camera) */,
  "sensor_model" TEXT /* Model or specific type of the sensor */,
  "sensor_manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "sensor_serial_number" TEXT /* Unique serial number for the sensor */,
  "sensor_specifications" TEXT /* Detailed specifications of the sensor */,
  "sensor_installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "sensor_location" TEXT /* Location where the sensor is installed */,
  "sensor_status" TEXT /* Current status of the sensor (e.g., operational, maintenance needed) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project this sensor is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "targets" (
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each target type */,
  "target_type" TEXT /* Description of the target type (e.g., Vehicles, Pedestrians) */,
  "target_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the target type */,
  "target_size" TEXT /* Typical size of the target */,
  "target_speed" TEXT /* Typical speed of the target */,
  "target_behavior" TEXT /* Common behavior patterns of the target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("target_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fusion_methods" (
  "fusion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fusion method */,
  "fusion_type" TEXT /* Type of fusion method (e.g., Low-Level, High-Level) */,
  "fusion_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the fusion method */,
  "fusion_algorithm" TEXT /* Specific algorithm used for the fusion method */,
  "fusion_performance_metrics" TEXT /* Key performance metrics for the fusion method */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project this fusion method is associated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fusion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fusion_methods_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frameworks" (
  "framework_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each framework */,
  "framework_name" TEXT /* Name of the framework (e.g., No, Yes) */,
  "framework_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the framework */,
  "framework_version" TEXT /* Version of the framework */,
  "framework_compatibility" TEXT /* Compatibility with different hardware and software */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("framework_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_sensor_targets" (
  "entry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor used */,
  "target_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the target detected */,
  "fusion_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the fusion method used */,
  "framework_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the framework used */,
  "detection_accuracy" TEXT /* Accuracy of target detection */,
  "detection_time" TEXT /* Average time taken for target detection */,
  "detection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of target detection */,
  "last_detection" TEXT /* Last known detection of the target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_sensor_targets_framework_id FOREIGN KEY ("framework_id") REFERENCES frameworks ("framework_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_sensor_targets_fusion_id FOREIGN KEY ("fusion_id") REFERENCES fusion_methods ("fusion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_sensor_targets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_sensor_targets_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_sensor_targets_target_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_id") REFERENCES targets ("target_id")
)
